---

## 2. Critical Finding: Agent Registry Mismatch

This is the biggest problem. Three sources of truth disagree on which agents exist.

### 2.1 Three-Way Comparison

| Agent file in src/agents/ | In AGENTS.md? | In CHANGELOG? | Status |
|---------------------------|---------------|---------------|--------|
| analyst.md | No | No | UNDOCUMENTED |
| architect.md | Yes | Yes | OK |
| code-reviewer.md | No | Yes (as "code-reviewer") | UNDOCUMENTED in AGENTS.md |
| critic.md | No | No | UNDOCUMENTED |
| debugger.md | Yes | Yes (as "debug-agent") | OK (name mismatch in CL) |
| designer.md | Yes | Yes (as "ux-specialist") | OK (name mismatch in CL) |
| document-specialist.md | No | Yes | In CL but not AGENTS.md |
| executor.md | Yes | Yes | OK |
| explorer.md | Yes | No | OK |
| git-master.md | No | No | UNDOCUMENTED |
| orchestrator.md | Yes | No | OK |
| planner.md | Yes | Yes | OK |
| qa-tester.md | No | No | UNDOCUMENTED |
| researcher.md | Yes | Yes | OK |
| reviewer.md | Yes | Yes | OK |
| scientist.md | No | No | UNDOCUMENTED |
| security-reviewer.md | No | Yes | In CL but not AGENTS.md |
| simplifier.md | No | No | UNDOCUMENTED |
| test-engineer.md | No | Yes | In CL but not AGENTS.md |
| tester.md | Yes | No | OK |
| tracer.md | No | No | UNDOCUMENTED |
| verifier.md | Yes | Yes | OK |
| writer.md | Yes | Yes | OK |

### 2.2 Agents in AGENTS.md But Missing from src/agents/

| AGENTS.md ID | Exists in src/agents/? |
|--------------|----------------------|
| devops | NO FILE |
| security | NO FILE (security-reviewer.md exists) |
| data | NO FILE |
| mobile | NO FILE |
| performance | NO FILE |
| integration | NO FILE |

Six agents are defined in the AGENTS.md registry but have no corresponding implementation file.

### 2.3 Resolution Required

The repo has two populations of agents that evolved independently:

**Population A (AGENTS.md/AGENTS_SPEC.md):** 18 agents designed as the "clean" registry. Includes domain agents (devops, data, mobile, performance, integration) that were never implemented.

**Population B (src/agents/):** 23 files that grew organically. Includes specialized review/analysis agents (analyst, critic, code-reviewer, qa-tester, scientist, simplifier, tracer, git-master, document-specialist, security-reviewer, test-engineer) borrowed from the OMC pattern.

---

## 3. Recommended Agent Consolidation: 24 Agents

Merge both populations. Keep everything that exists in src/agents/. Add the 6 missing domain agents from AGENTS.md. Drop none. Total: 29 files, but some overlap. After dedup:

### 3.1 Consolidated Registry (24 agents)

| # | ID | Tier | Source | Notes |
|---|-----|------|--------|-------|
| 1 | orchestrator | high | Both | Keep. Delegation-only coordinator. |
| 2 | explorer | standard | Both | Keep. Codebase surveys. |
| 3 | planner | high | Both | Keep. Architecture, sequencing. |
| 4 | executor | high | Both | Keep. Implementation workhorse. |
| 5 | verifier | standard | Both | Keep. Testing, diagnostics. |
| 6 | writer | standard | Both | Keep. Documentation. |
| 7 | reviewer | high | Both | Keep. General code review. |
| 8 | designer | high | Both | Keep. UI/UX, Figma. |
| 9 | researcher | standard | Both | Keep. External docs, benchmarking. |
| 10 | tester | standard | Both | Keep. Test authoring, execution. |
| 11 | debugger | high | Both | Keep. Error diagnosis. |
| 12 | architect | high | Both | Keep. System design. |
| 13 | analyst | standard | src/ only | Keep. Quality metrics, complexity. |
| 14 | code-reviewer | high | src/ only | Keep. Separate from reviewer: focused on PR-style reviews. |
| 15 | critic | high | src/ only | Keep. Final review. Finds what others missed. |
| 16 | document-specialist | standard | src/ only | Keep. Specialized doc formats (API specs, ADRs). |
| 17 | git-master | standard | src/ only | Keep. Branch strategy, conflict resolution. |
| 18 | qa-tester | standard | src/ only | Keep. QA perspective (user flows, acceptance criteria). |
| 19 | scientist | high | src/ only | Keep. Data analysis, experiment design. |
| 20 | security-reviewer | high | src/ only | Keep. Replaces "security" from AGENTS.md with stronger name. |
| 21 | simplifier | standard | src/ only | Keep. Complexity reduction, refactoring for clarity. |
| 22 | test-engineer | standard | src/ only | Keep. Test infrastructure, CI integration. |
| 23 | tracer | standard | src/ only | Keep. Execution tracing, causal analysis. |
| 24 | devops | standard | AGENTS.md only | CREATE. CI/CD, containers, deployment. |

### 3.2 Agents Dropped (Absorbed)

| AGENTS.md ID | Absorbed by | Reason |
|--------------|-------------|--------|
| security | security-reviewer | Same role, better name. |
| data | scientist | Scientist covers data analysis. Add DB migration to its scope. |
| mobile | executor | Mobile builds are implementation work. Add mobile tools to executor. |
| performance | analyst | Performance profiling is analysis. Add LSP/Bash to analyst. |
| integration | executor | API wiring is implementation. Executor handles it. |

### 3.3 Files to Create

```
src/agents/devops.md       # New: CI/CD, containers, deployment
```

### 3.4 Files to Update

```
AGENTS.md                  # Expand from 18 to 24 agents
spec/AGENTS_SPEC.md        # Match new registry
CHANGELOG.md               # Fix agent name inconsistencies
plugin.json                # Reference all 24 agents
```

---

## 4. Skill Analysis

### 4.1 Implemented Skills (21)

| Skill file | Slash command | Execution mode? | Status |
|-----------|--------------|-----------------|--------|
| autopilot.mts | /autopilot | Yes | Implemented |
| ralph.mts | /ralph | Yes | Implemented |
| ultrawork.mts | /ultrawork | Yes | Implemented |
| team.mts | /team | Yes | Implemented |
| ecomode.mts | /ecomode | Yes | Implemented |
| swarm.mts | /swarm | Yes | Implemented |
| pipeline.mts | /pipeline | Yes | Implemented |
| deep-interview.mts | /deep-interview | No | Implemented |
| omp-plan.mts | /omp-plan | No | Implemented |
| omp-setup.mts | /omp-setup | No | Implemented |
| setup.mts | /setup | No | Implemented |
| mcp-setup.mts | /mcp-setup | No | Implemented |
| hud.mts | /hud | No | Implemented |
| wiki.mts | /wiki | No | Implemented |
| learner.mts | /learner | No | Implemented |
| note.mts | /note | No | Implemented |
| trace.mts | /trace | No | Implemented |
| release.mts | /release | No | Implemented |
| configure-notifications.mts | /configure-notifications | No | Implemented |
| psm.mts | /psm | No | Implemented |
| swe-bench.mts | /swe-bench | No | Implemented |

### 4.2 Missing: Copilot CLI Skill Discovery

Skills exist as TypeScript files in `src/skills/`. Copilot CLI discovers skills from `skills/<name>/SKILL.md` directories, not from TypeScript files. The esbuild pipeline compiles these to `dist/`, but Copilot CLI needs static SKILL.md files in the plugin package.

**Gap:** No `skills/` directory with SKILL.md files exists at the plugin root. The TypeScript implementations in `src/skills/` are runtime code, not discoverable skill definitions.

**Action:** Create `skills/<name>/SKILL.md` for each of the 21 skills. Each SKILL.md wraps the skill's purpose and invocation instructions. The TypeScript file provides the runtime logic.

### 4.3 Skill Count vs Claim

README claims "30+ skills". Only 21 exist. The gap of 9 is not explained. Either the count was aspirational or skills were planned but not implemented. The 21 that exist cover all execution modes and developer tools.

---

## 5. HUD: Gap Between Spec and Your Requirement

### 5.1 What the Repo Has

spec/HUD.md defines:
```
[OMP] <mode> | ctx <contextPct>% | tok <tokensUsed>/<tokensTotal> | agent:<lastAgent> | <taskProgress>% | <status>
```

Implementation exists in `src/hud/` with three modules: renderer.mts, metrics.mts, formatters.mts. Three display strategies defined: Copilot CLI status file, tmux, file polling.

### 5.2 What You Want

A oneliner showing: OMP version, model in use, available tokens vs total, session length, context %, tools loaded/used, skills loaded/used.

### 5.3 Required HUD Oneliner (Merged Format)

```
[OMP v1.0.0] autopilot | opus | ctx:67% | tok:~67k/200k | 14m | tools:8/13 | skills:3/21 | agents:4/24 | 42% running
```

### 5.4 New Fields to Track

| Field | Currently tracked? | Action |
|-------|-------------------|--------|
| Version | No | Read from package.json at init |
| Active model | No | Get from model-router hook output |
| Session duration | Partial (startedAt exists) | Compute in renderer |
| Tools used/total | No | Count unique tool calls per session |
| Skills used/total | No | Count skill invocations per session |
| Agents used (cumulative) | Partial (agentsActive is current, not cumulative) | Accumulate in Set |

### 5.5 Files to Modify

```
src/hud/metrics.mts        # Add version, model, duration, tool/skill/agent counters
src/hud/renderer.mts       # Update format template to oneliner
src/hud/formatters.mts     # Add formatDuration(), formatTokens() with ~ prefix
spec/HUD.md                # Update format, add Strategy D (statusLine)
```

### 5.6 Copilot CLI statusLine Integration (New Strategy D)

Add experimental `status_line` config written during `omp setup`:

```json
// ~/.copilot/config.json
{
  "status_line": {
    "type": "command",
    "command": "node ~/.omp/hud/omp-hud.mjs"
  }
}
```

The script reads real context data from Copilot CLI on stdin (model, context_window, cost) and merges it with OMP state from `~/.omp/hud/state.json`. Outputs the formatted oneliner to stdout.

---

## 6. Hook System: Gaps

### 6.1 Trigger Model Translation

spec/HOOKS.md defines custom triggers: `pre-cycle`, `post-cycle`, `pre-message`, `post-message`. Copilot CLI uses: `PreToolUse`, `PostToolUse`, `UserPromptSubmitted`, `SessionStart`, `SessionEnd`.

No translation layer exists in code. The hooks.json in `hooks/` must use Copilot CLI event types.

**Action:** Update hooks/hooks.json to use Copilot CLI events. Map:

| OMP trigger | Copilot CLI event |
|-------------|-------------------|
| pre-cycle (keyword-detector) | UserPromptSubmitted |
| pre-cycle (delegation-enforcer) | PreToolUse |
| pre-cycle (model-router) | PreToolUse |
| post-message (token-tracker) | PostToolUse |
| post-cycle (hud-emitter) | PostToolUse |
| post-message (stop-continuation) | PostToolUse |

### 6.2 hooks.json Needs Regeneration

The hooks.json must reference compiled `.mjs` outputs, not `.mts` sources. The esbuild config compiles `src/hooks/*.mts` to `dist/hooks/*.mjs`. The hooks.json must point to `dist/hooks/`.

---

## 7. Test Coverage: Critical Gap

### 7.1 Current State

Only 2 test files exist: `tests/utils/logger.test.mts` and `tests/utils/timer.test.mts`. Test directories for benchmark, cli, e2e, and setup exist but are empty or not scanned.

---

## 8. Plugin Format Gaps

### 8.1 Copilot CLI Plugin Requirements

Copilot CLI needs these files to discover agents and skills:

| Required | Path | Status |
|----------|------|--------|
| plugin.json | .github/plugin/plugin.json | Exists (not read) |
| agents/*.agent.md | agents/*.agent.md | MISSING at plugin root |
| skills/*/SKILL.md | skills/*/SKILL.md | MISSING at plugin root |
| hooks.json | hooks/hooks.json | Exists |
| .mcp.json | .mcp.json | Exists |
| marketplace.json | .github/plugin/marketplace.json | UNKNOWN |

The agents live in `src/agents/*.md` (not `agents/*.agent.md`). The skills live in `src/skills/*.mts` (not `skills/*/SKILL.md`). Copilot CLI cannot discover either.

### 8.2 Actions

1. Create `agents/` directory at repo root with `.agent.md` files (copy from src/agents/ with extension rename, or use symlinks).
2. Create `skills/` directory at repo root with `SKILL.md` wrapper files for each of the 21 skills.
3. Update plugin.json to reference `./agents` and `./skills/*`.
4. Verify marketplace.json exists.

---

## 9. Additional Findings

### 9.1 .omc/ Directory

An `.omc/` directory exists alongside `.omp/`. This is likely a legacy artifact from OMC (oh-my-claudecode) compatibility testing. Decide whether to keep it for cross-compat or remove it.

### 9.2 License Discrepancy

GitHub page shows Apache-2.0. package.json says MIT. Pick one.

### 9.3 README Claims "30+ skills" but Only 21 Exist

Either add 9 more skills or update the README to say "21 skills". The missing skills could be: configure-agents, doctor, status, cost-report, benchmark-compare, deep-search, git-workflow, deploy, ci-check.

### 9.4 Fleet Bridge Exists

`src/psm/fleet-bridge.mts` confirms fleet mode integration is implemented. This is good. The original spec recommended this. Verify it dispatches to Copilot CLI's `/fleet` command.

---

## 10. Implementation Plan for Claude Code

### Phase 1: Agent Alignment (Day 1)

```
# 1. Create Copilot CLI agent files from src/agents/
mkdir -p agents/
for f in src/agents/*.md; do
  name=$(basename "$f" .md)
  cp "$f" "agents/${name}.agent.md"
done

# 2. Create devops.md (only missing agent)
```

## 11. Acceptance Criteria

| # | Criterion | Metric |
|---|-----------|--------|
| 1 | `copilot plugin install r3dlex/oh-my-copilot` succeeds | Pass/fail |
| 2 | All 24 agents appear in agent listing | 24/24 |
| 3 | All 21 skills appear as slash commands | 21/21 |
| 4 | `autopilot: build a TODO API` runs end-to-end | Working code output |
| 5 | HUD oneliner displays all required fields | Version, model, ctx, tok, session, tools, skills, agents |
| 6 | HUD updates after every tool call | Verified via file polling |
| 7 | statusLine integration works with `--experimental` | Copilot CLI renders the line |
| 8 | All hooks complete under 200ms (p99) | Profiling |
| 9 | Test coverage reaches 90% | Vitest coverage report |
| 10 | AGENTS.md, CHANGELOG.md, spec/* are consistent | Manual review |
| 11 | Cross-compat: plugin installs in Claude Code | `claude plugin install ./` |
| 12 | Token estimates within 30% of `/usage` output | Spot check 10 sessions |"
